Package dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.dto.tmpl

@JStachePath(prefix="templates/", suffix=".mustache") @JStacheConfig(type=STACHE) package dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.dto.tmpl
Contexts for DTO template.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.dto
    Generation of DTO classes.
  • Class
    Description
    CtxDto
    Context passed to Mustache when compiling a model.
    CtxDtoDiscriminator
    Custom extensions.
    CtxDtoDiscriminator.ModelMapping
    Defines a mapping between a model (DTO) name and a name used in the serialization stream.
    CtxDtoExt
    Custom extensions.
    CtxEnum
    Context passed to Mustache when compiling an enum.
    CtxEnum.CtxEnumEntry
    Context describing an enumeration entry.
    CtxExtraDateSerializer
    Context passed to Mustache when compiling an extra template.
    CtxInterface
    Context passed to Mustache when compiling an interface.
    CtxProperty
    Context for a DTO property.
    CtxPropertyExt
    Custom extensions.
    CtxValidation
    Context for bean validation.
